name: WordPress & SEO Services Outreach
subject: {{name}}, kya aapki website Google pe nahi aa rahi? 🚀
description: Cold outreach for WordPress design and SEO services

defaultVariables.emailTitle: Aapki website ko Google ka #1 banana chahte hain
defaultVariables.emailSubtitle: Professional Web Design + SEO jo results deta hai
defaultVariables.openingLine: Aaj main aapke paas ek specific reason se aaya hoon — maine dekha ki aapka business online grow karne ki potential hai, lekin website us level pe nahi hai jo chahiye.
defaultVariables.problemStatement: Aaj ke time mein agar aapki website slow hai, mobile-friendly nahi hai, ya Google pe nazar nahi aati — to aap har din potential customers kho rahe hain.
defaultVariables.solutionIntro: Main WordPress websites design karta hoon aur SEO karta hoon jo sirf dikhne mein nahi, balki actual leads aur sales laane mein kaam aati hain.
defaultVariables.wpServiceDesc: Clean, fast aur mobile-friendly WordPress website jo aapke business ko professionally represent kare.
defaultVariables.seoServiceDesc: On-page aur local SEO jo aapko Google search mein top pe laaye aur organic traffic badhaye.
defaultVariables.speedServiceDesc: Website speed optimization — slow website 70% visitors ko bhaga deti hai, hum use fix karte hain.
defaultVariables.offerHeadline: Free Website Audit + 1 Month SEO Consultation
defaultVariables.offerDetail: Pehle 10 clients ke liye — koi hidden charges nahi
defaultVariables.testimonialText: Sirf 3 mahine mein meri website ka organic traffic 3x ho gaya. Best investment thi mere business ke liye.
defaultVariables.closingLine: Agar aap seriously apna online presence grow karna chahte hain to ek baar baat karte hain — bilkul free. Reply kar dijiye ya upar wala button click karein.
